articles.title: The case for Trump’s tariffs looks strong a year on from ‘liberation day’
articles.body: Economists’ lurid forecasts of disaster have not been realised

articles.title: Trump administration announces new tariffs on pharmaceuticals
articles.body: White House also rolls back levies on some metals in an attempt to simplify duties

articles.title: UK urges pharma companies to invest after reaching drug pricing deal with US
articles.body: Accord will result in higher medicines spending in Britain in exchange for exemption from threatened Trump tariffs

articles.title: Goldman and Citi tell Paris staff to work from home after thwarted BofA attack
articles.body: US authorities warned the banks of potential security threats
